specific_mechanism: BRAID-TOP: braid-group representation as topological-defect detector in token-attention
llm_application: Map K-token attention permutations to braid-group elements; detect non-trivial braid (topological defect) when permutation is non-identity; use as routing signal.
novelty_claim: R697 used Liouville symplectic for topological-defect; R682 used Tate cohomology. R714 distinct via braid-group representation.
